purpose.zh: 咨询汇报、客户分析、战略方案。
purpose.en: Consulting reports, customer analysis, and strategy proposals.

style.zh: 高端咨询版式，麦肯锡蓝、结构化数据图表、留白克制。
style.en: Premium consulting layout with McKinsey blue, structured data visuals, and restrained whitespace.

templateStrength: Reusable style distilled from a finished PowerPoint deck.
